headline: Visa Expands Digital Reach As Valuation Screens Below Analyst Targets
summary: Visa (NYSE:V) has become a cornerstone investor in SoftBank's PayPay IPO in the U.S., aiming to deepen its position in digital payments. The company has completed acquisitions of Prisma Medios de Pago and Newpay in Argentina, expanding its presence in Latin America. Visa is also broadening partnerships, including support for Apple Pay's entry into India and launching the Visa Young Creators program with the Global Fashion Agenda. Visa sits at the center of global card and digital payment...

headline: SoftBank-Backed PayPay Files For US IPO, Aiming For $13.4 Billion Valuation In High-Stakes Market Test
summary: SoftBank Group-backed PayPay has filed for a $1.1 billion U.S. IPO seeking a valuation of up to $13.4 billion, betting its dominant position in Japan's cashless payments market can attract investors despite volatile global conditions.

headline: Visa and Global Fashion Agenda Back Emerging Designers with Circular Fashion Programme
summary: Global Fashion Agenda (GFA) and Visa have launched Visa Young Creators: Recycle the Runway, a programme celebrating and empowering emerging designers to reimagine fashion through innovative circular design. An expert jury joins the programme to review and shortlist applications alongside the official Recycle the Runway Ambassador, Author and Podcaster, Gemma Styles.
